name: io.github.Fabsbags/sbb-mcp
description: MCP client for the SwissTrip SBB MCP service — schedules, prices, and ticket links for Swiss Federal Railways (SBB/CFF/FFS).

environmentVariables.name: SWISSTRIP_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Optional SwissTrip account token for cloud-synced traveler profiles. Mint at https://swisstrip.app/settings/developer.

environmentVariables.name: SBB_MCP_URL
environmentVariables.description: Override the hosted server URL. Default: https://mcp.swisstrip.app/mcp.
